Query
  Let $threats
    Pipeline
      From
        Source idx_backend
      Stage where
        In
          Ident threat_type
          Array
            String "sqli"
            String "path_traversal"
      Stage keep
        Pattern client_ip
        Pattern threat_type
  Let $logins
    Pipeline
      From
        Source idx_audit
      Stage where
        Binary and
          Binary ==
            Ident type
            String "USER_LOGIN"
          Binary ==
            Ident res
            String "failed"
      Stage stats
        Aggs
          Agg
            Call count
            Alias failures
        By
          Ident src_ip
      Stage rename
        Rename src_ip as client_ip
  Pipeline
    From
      Source $threats
    Stage join
      Type inner
      On
        Ident client_ip
      With
        CTERef $logins
    Stage keep
      Pattern client_ip
      Pattern threat_type
      Pattern failures
